channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Kiambu Woman's Car Burnt in Githurai Amid Fuel Price Protests Over UDA Campaign Materials
item.description: On Monday, May 18, protests erupted in various parts of the country following a steep rise in fuel prices as announced by the Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA), bringing transport opera...

item.title: Family Requests Fresh Postmortem for Woman Found Dead at Marital Home in Bhopal Amid Dowry Allegations
item.description: A 33-year-old woman from Noida was found dead at her marital home in Katara Hills, Bhopal on May 12, 2026, barely six months after her marriage. Her family has accused her husband, a lawyer, and his m...

item.title: Ontario lifts restrictions on holiday retail openings, starting with Victoria Day and Family Day
item.description: Ontario has recently lifted the long-standing ban on grocery stores, shopping malls, and other retailers operating on certain holidays, starting with Victoria Day and Family Day. The change allows bus...

item.title: Tensions with Iran push oil prices higher and raise fears of economic slowdown
item.description: Global markets reacted sharply on Monday to ongoing tensions between the U.S. and Iran, which have disrupted the flow of oil through the Strait of Hormuz. Government bonds continued to sell off amid f...

item.title: Solar Home Systems Boost Mobile Money Use Mainly Among Better-Off Rural Households in Malawi
item.description: Recent research indicates that solar home systems in rural Malawi are significantly enhancing the use of mobile money, but the benefits are largely skewed towards households that are relatively better...

item.title: CAR-T Cell Therapy Shows Early Promise in Long-Term HIV Control
item.description: A small clinical trial has demonstrated that CAR-T cell therapy, a treatment previously used for certain cancers, could help control HIV long-term. In the study, researchers reprogrammed participants'...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Issues 7-Day Weather Forecast for May 19–25
item.description: Nairobi – The Kenya Meteorological Department (KMD) has issued the seven-day weather forecast covering Tuesday, May 19, to Monday, May 25, 2026. According to the update, rainfall is expected to contin...

item.title: Pakistan Sends Troops and Jets to Support Saudi Arabia Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: Pakistan imepeleka majeshi 8,000 pamoja na kikosi cha ndege za kivita na mfumo wa ulinzi wa anga kwenda Saudi Arabia chini ya mkataba wa ulinzi wa pamoja. Operesheni hii ni kubwa na yenye uwezo wa kiv...

item.title: Global companies face $25 billion losses due to Iran conflict
item.description: The ongoing US-Israeli conflict with Iran is already putting a heavy financial burden on companies across the world, estimated at over $25 billion and still increasing. Businesses are struggling with ...

item.title: Karen Nyamu Responds to Questions About Ex Samidoh Amid Co-Parenting
item.description: Nominated senator Karen Nyamu has stirred reactions online after taking a swipe at her ex-partner, musician Samidoh Muchoki. The two share two children, and fans have often noted the striking resembla...

item.title: Shaun Micallef reflects on Australia's gambling culture
item.description: In this reflective piece, Shaun Micallef shares his personal perspective on gambling and its deep-rooted presence in Australian society. Despite being too cautious to gamble himself, Micallef embarked...

item.title: Zanzibar Plans Major Investment to Improve Health Services for Pregnant Women and General Public
item.description: The Zanzibar Revolutionary Government (ZRG) is planning to spend Sh1 trillion between 2026 and 2030 to improve health services across the islands. The announcement came from Dr Mngereza Mzee Miraji, P...

item.title: Evaleen Mitei Recognised for Transformative Leadership at TSC
item.description: Evaleen Mitei, the acting CEO of Kenya's Teachers Service Commission (TSC), has been honoured at the 7th East Africa Superwoman Awards for her outstanding leadership and transformative work in the edu...

item.title: Exploring Algal Blooms in the Baltic Sea Through Art and Science
item.description: Małgorzata Stankiewicz’s book 'Viridescent, Afire' combines art, science, and mythology to examine the growing problem of algal blooms in the Baltic Sea. Using a blend of cyanotypes, satellite imagery...

item.title: Marcus Begins Investigation Mission on Isla Damai in Episode 31 of Blood vs Duty
item.description: In the latest episode of the popular Filipino series 'Blood vs Duty,' titled Episode 31, the protagonist Marcus embarks on a critical mission to investigate Isla Damai. As the storyline progresses, Ma...

item.title: PETROAN Rivers State Elects New 12-Member Executive to Lead for Four Years
item.description: The Petroleum Products Retail Owners Association of Nigeria (PETROAN), Rivers State branch, don elect new 12-member executive wey go run the association for the next four years. This election happen d...

item.title: Governor Fubara Approves Promotion Exercise For Rivers Civil Servants Across All Levels
item.description: Rivers State Governor Siminalayi Fubara don give approval for promotion of civil servants for all levels inside the State Civil Service. The Rivers State Civil Service Commission don issue circular we...

item.title: ICE Tactical Trainer Linked to Multiple Fatal Police Shootings
item.description: David S. Norman, a former Phoenix police officer and founder of the law enforcement training firm TruKinetics LLC, has a documented history of involvement in multiple lethal police shootings. Norman, ...

item.title: Court Upholds Bar Association's 2024 Election Process, Dismissing Challenge
item.description: In Arusha, the Court of Appeal of Tanzania has dismissed an appeal by lawyer Steven Kitale who challenged the High Court’s decision regarding the Tanganyika Law Society's (TLS) 2024 Annual General Mee...

item.title: Anya Chalotra addresses appearance rumours following The Witcher role
item.description: Anya Chalotra, the British-Indian actress famed for her role as Yennefer of Vengerberg in Netflix's The Witcher, has faced widespread speculation about her appearance. Fans noticed changes in her faci...
